Yes we can check how long it took for udp packet to be sent to server like ping but only one direction

In C# we can use the DateTime class to measure the time between sending the packet and receiving the response

We can create a UDP client that sends a message to a server and measures the time taken for the response to come back

We can then compare the time taken to send the packet with the time taken for the response to arrive

This can be done using the Stopwatch class in C#

We can also use the NetworkInformation class to get the IP address and port of the server
